title: Department of Public Relations and Advertising - Student Opinions
content:
Department of Public Relations and Advertising - Student Opinions

"It is a very important detail that we have the chance to communicate one-on-one with our faculty members and advisors. I love that our university helps us to improve our skills day by day and to have an idea about our department and the future opportunities with useful activities."

Melisa Bulut

"The faculty members are well-equipped and good at their job. What I like most about the school is the way the lecturers teach and the smoothness of communication."

Kaan Akdağ

"I have been studying at Esenyurt University for 3 years. It is a very good university with its academic staff and student quality. In addition, the quiet environment of the library and its many content are perfect opportunities for the students. In addition, my favorite part of the school is the ease of reaching the teachers, when we want to communicate they return immediately."

Asya Maviş

“I believe that the knowledge and the practical experience that our lecturers have equipped us will carry us to good levels both in our lives and in the business environment. I would like to thank  to all our lecturers for this.”

Tolga Akçelik

This content was updated on 09/09/2024.
